parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: $node['Normalize Input'].json.model, temperature: 0.2, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: '你是中文内容编辑助手。你的任务是把输入素材清洗并改写成高质量中文文章。必须只输出 JSON，不要 Markdown，不要额外解释。输出格式：{"title_cn":"","summary_cn":"","article_cn":"","keywords":[""],"quality_check":{"facts_only_from_input":true,"removed_noise":true,"language":"zh-CN"}}' }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify({ instruction: $node['Normalize Input'].json.prompt, audience: $node['Normalize Input'].json.audience, tone: $node['Normalize Input'].json.tone, input: { title: $node['Normalize Input'].json.title, source: $node['Normalize Input'].json.source, url: $node['Normalize Input'].json.url, content: $node['Normalize Input'].json.content } }) } ] } }}
